figures.caption: Table 1: Empirical Results on AntMaze. We compare our method with existing offline-to-online adaptation and offline RL baselines on AntMaze. Our method achieves performance comparable to or better than existing baselines. Results are reported as D4RL scores averaged over four random seeds.
Table 2: Hyperparameters. We demonstrate the hyperparameters used in the empirical experiment with the practical implementation of O2O-LSVI.
